headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if dispute escalates or results in adverse arbitration outcome — Bangladesh's arbitration move on coal pricing with Adani Power signals moderate governance risk, limited immediate P&L impact
what_matters: No current P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is not quantifiable at this stage.
Triggers BRSR, TCFD, COSO ERM framework relevance; no regulatory deadlines or penalties yet.
Marginal potential for cost of capital increase (+20-40bps) if governance concerns escalate, but no immediate FII outflow.
